spec_match.rationale: The demo refers to a generic <button type='capability'> element rather than the <usermedia> element defined by this feature's index.

interactive.rationale: Provides simulated state controls to view the visual representation of each state and test real camera access.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The blurb focuses on visual state classes and attributes for a capability button rather than <usermedia> wrapper/activation.

edge_cases.rationale: Well-structured simulation of all five states (idle, pending, granted, denied, unsupported) with appropriate explanations.

references.rationale: Links correctly back to the feature index and siblings.

design_system.rationale: Maintains consistent design language and utilizes warning/information boxes effectively.

openQuestions.title: Update demo to use <usermedia> syntax
openQuestions.detail: The demo currently code-illustrates `<button type='capability' capability='camera'>`, but the main feature is `<usermedia>`. The fallback states and illustrations should be updated to reflect how <usermedia>'s inner children or state attributes actually behave.

summary: A well-rounded simulator of the fallback states, but it showcases an incorrect capability button proposal instead of the actual <usermedia> tag.
